name: Kanokphan Sirithienthong
title: Economics Student
bio: This webpage created as a representative of my works and interests and a convenience for anyone who is looking forward to network. Please rotate your device in horizontal to view full collections. :)
bio2: Coming fourth-year Economics student based in Bangkok, Thailand. Like to initiate and bring innovative ideas into the table. I am a risk-seeker, obsessing  to deep dive in every challenges, hard work, out going and open for any opportunities. Capable to communicate in Thai (native), and English (fluent).
